tg.exp_basis: PVC Tg 354 K (81 C) +/-5%; honest band (NOT the tight [345,360]/[334,374] variants).
tg.tg_note: single sweep; FAIL low. PVC replicate Tg scatter 308-348 K. PVC MD Tg from these runs is fit-limited and scattered (308-348 K), straddling exp 354 K from below; multirate fits are POOR/inverted (slope-fail). Tg is NOT a validated property for PVC -- treat as unreliable, density is the validated headline. (No physical FF-underestimate claim: below-exp glassy Tg despite fast cooling is fit pathology, not a real offset.)

density.exp_basis: amorphous PVC 1.385 g/cm3 +/-5% (polymer_rules PVNL density is null).
density.density_note: HEADLINE PASS x4 (PVC's only validated property). PCFF ~2.5-3% low -- inside band but on the low side.

bulk_modulus.method_note: glassy hierarchy: Murnaghan WIDE [-1000,0,1500,3000,5000], B0'=10.3, r2=0.9996 VALID primary. FAIL low. PVC2/3/4 cluster 2.7-2.9 GPa vs exp [3.5,4.5] = robust ~20-35% PCFF underestimate (consistent across methods+replicates; caveat: PCFF/PPPM virial). PVC1 has no valid K.

provenance.review_note: PVC replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: consistent bands; density headline PASS (low); Tg unreliable (scattered/inverted fits); K robust ~20-35% PCFF underestimate; PVC1 no valid K. Weakest validation set -- only density passes, and it passes low.
